description: Scheduled maintenance tasks with configurable intervals. Tasks run on session start when overdue.

tasks.name: prune-memory
tasks.description: Archives old memories and compacts unenriched auto-captures

tasks.name: rebuild-index
tasks.description: Rebuilds the searchable memory index from .github/memory/ files

tasks.name: memory-health
tasks.description: Generates health metrics report for the memory system

tasks.name: detect-conflicts
tasks.description: Scans for unresolved memory conflicts between agents

tasks.name: memory-to-skill
tasks.description: Distills recurring patterns from memories into skill updates
